creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209176
svn(1) diff against the ports tree

The upgrade to 3.1.0 brings too many improvements to name; the most notable new feature, though, is riscv64 support.

This is currently for comments/testing only -- consumers need to catch up to changes in base/ before 3.1.0 is usable. The pkg-plist is probably still wrong, as I'm still testport'ing it.
